ground_truth_summary: Pop-art trading card, Pac-Man theme. Yin-yang: LEFT=yellow with RED GHOST (eyes white, looking right); RIGHT=red with YELLOW PACMAN (mouth open right). Background: CYAN with concentric BLACK CIRCLES (not spirals). Text: pacman 46 / 010 / ZEN MASTER / "Inner peace!" / ♦ RARE / 24,620 / beat my score → / pacman46.com.

key_hits: Yellow half contains red ghost (correct pairing)
Red half contains yellow Pac-Man (correct pairing)
Concentric circles (correct pattern)
All text verbatim and correctly placed
Cyan/teal background color
Identifies Blinky from Pac-Man
key_misses: Describes orientation as top-left/bottom-right rather than pure left/right (still implies correct halves)
Calls it 'high-score card / social media share' rather than trading card
judgments.justification: Correctly identifies the color-character pairings on each side of the yin-yang, the concentric circles, and all text. Loses points only for using top-left/bottom-right phrasing instead of clean left/right, and a slightly off classification of the card type.

judgments.justification: Vague on the critical orientation question and fails to clearly distinguish the ghost from Pac-Man. Background color description is muddied. Text OCR is solid, but the visual analysis lacks the precision needed for this card.
